dialogueLines.text: Oh I guess we got in before the enemy di-

Echo, I think this is what happened whe Bary left... You need to save Darry and make sure he gets out of the house safely.  You will need to move objects around to make a path for Darry to get him to the front door While keeping the enemy away from him.  Blocking off the enemy's path will slow him down so think fast to save Darry.
